nasb.text: The Pharisees heard the crowd muttering these things about Him, and the chief priests and the Pharisees sent officers to seize Him.

esv.text: The Pharisees heard the crowd muttering these things about him, and the chief priests and Pharisees sent officers to arrest him.

cnv.text: 法利賽人聽見群眾紛紛議論這些關於耶穌的事，祭司長和法利賽人就派差役去逮捕耶穌。

ccb.text: 法利赛人听见众人这样议论耶稣，就联合祭司长派差役去抓祂。

csbs.text: 法利赛人听到了众人私下议论耶稣的这些事。于是祭司长们和法利赛人就派差役们去抓他。
